entities.name: ETHIOPIA
entities.description: The country characterized as a land of agriculture with diverse suitability factors.

entities.name: AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The primary industry and practice discussed in the context of Ethiopian endowment.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL SUITABILITY FACTORS
entities.description: Diverse combinations of factors that make land suitable for farming.

entities.name: GLOBAL AGRICULTURAL CIVILIZATION
entities.description: The worldwide development of agricultural practices and societies.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCT SURPLUS
entities.description: The excess of agricultural production resulting from a central role in agricultural civilization.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL RESOURCE LANDSCAPES
entities.description: The input-output responsive landscapes in Ethiopia endowed with specific ecological icons.

entities.name: PATCHY SYSTEM
entities.description: A system used to demonstrate the input-output responsiveness of agricultural resource landscapes.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL ECOLOGY
entities.description: The ecological framework allowing for diverse specialty across space and time in Ethiopian landscapes.

entities.name: TECHNOLOGY COMBINATION
entities.description: The specific combination of technologies that support gain maximization in agricultural landscapes.

entities.name: MIS-USE AND ABUSE
entities.description: The primary cause for the dwindling and fading of agricultural resource landscapes.
